## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Baseten and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and AI visibility tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented initial blog ideas based on Baseten's content strategy, focusing on high-performance inference positioning](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Baseten to review and prioritize keyword ideas in Airtable, considering their "performance push" initiative](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard reviewed for tracking AI visibility; Baseten currently at 4% overall AI presence](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Content generation to start with 2-3 articles, ramping up to 5, with a calibration blog to align on voice and tone](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Keyword Research

  - [GrowthX developed blog ideas based on Baseten's content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Focus on informational keywords, how-to guides, and LLM-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Airtable used as content calendar with client views for review](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Some zero search volume keywords included for product messaging and LLM content](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Baseten to review and prioritize keywords, leaving comments or emoji reactions](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)

### Competitor Comparison Pages

  - [Existing "Compare" subfolder (e.g., Baseten vs Fireworks) used for paid marketing](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Pages are indexed but may need revision for higher-level content](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide recommendations for improving comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Dedicated pipeline for creating comparison blog posts efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Content Placement and Organization

  - [Discussion on where to publish new content (guides vs. blog)](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Potential creation of a dedicated "guide" section for SEO and LLM-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Need to align new content with existing design assets and style](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [Scrunch dashboard tracks Baseten's presence across various LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Currently at 4% overall AI presence with mostly positive sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [Prompts based on audience personas, with potential to incorporate real customer questions](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Suggestion to extract common questions from Gong (sales call recording tool)](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Competitors to be added: Fireworks, Together AI, AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, Google Vertex](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

### Content Strategy Insights

  - [Prompt breakdown helps identify topics for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Visibility changes in specific topics guide content cluster development](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [ChatGPT's August algorithm change reduced branded domain references](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Backlinks and mentions from partners (NVIDIA, Google Cloud) are beneficial for visibility](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Baseten to review and prioritize keyword ideas in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [GrowthX to add missing competitors (Fireworks, Together AI, etc.) to Scrunch tracking](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Baseten to receive PDF export of Scrunch dashboard for review](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate extracting common questions from Gong for prompt creation](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [GrowthX to create calibration blog post for voice and tone alignment](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Begin content generation with 2-3 initial articles, scaling up to 5](https://fathom.video/share/rp8P66aVazUBFZHX9fxGebK6zy5Qrxgm?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
